attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY  AS SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.BK_SO_HOLD_DTM AS BK_SO_HOLD_DTM,
TVOUTPUT.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME AS BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.BK_SALES_ORDER_KEY AS BK_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT AS SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
TVOUTPUT.SS_CD AS SS_CD,
TVOUTPUT.SO_RELEASED_ROLE AS SO_RELEASED_ROLE, 
TVOUTPUT.SO_HOLD_REASON_TXT AS SO_HOLD_REASON_TXT ,
TVOUTPUT.SO_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME AS SO_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
TVOUTPUT.SO_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME AS SO_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME ,
TVOUTPUT.RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT AS RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT,
TVOUTPUT.RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD,
TVOUTPUT.RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DT AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DT,
TVOUTPUT.RU_SO_HLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USR_NAME AS RU_SO_HLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USR_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
TVOUTPUT.RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DTM,
TVOUTPUT.DV_SO_HOLD_DT,
TVOUTPUT.SO_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT ,
TVOUTPUT.SO_HOLD_COMMENT ,
TVOUTPUT.RU_SO_RELEASE_COMMENT ,
TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DTM,
COALESCE (MAX ( CAST(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DTM AS TIMESTAMP(0)) - INTERVAL '1'  MINUTE ) 
		OVER (PARTITION BY 	TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY
			  ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DTM ASC 
			  ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), TIMESTAMP '3500-01-01 00:00:00') END_TV_DTM ,
TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE AS ACTION_CODE ,
ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY
		ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DTM ASC)  AS RANK_INDEX,
(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NSOHT_OUT.SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY  IS NOT NULL  THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) DML_TYPE

FROM
	(
	SELECT
	TVINPUT.SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY,
	TVINPUT.START_TV_DTM,
        TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
	TVINPUT.BK_SO_HOLD_DTM,
	TVINPUT.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME,
	TVINPUT.BK_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
	TVINPUT.SO_RELEASED_ROLE,
	TVINPUT.SS_CD,
	TVINPUT.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
	TVINPUT.RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DT,
	TVINPUT.RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD,
	TVINPUT.SO_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
        TVINPUT.SO_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME ,
        TVINPUT.SO_HOLD_REASON_TXT,
	TVINPUT.RU_SO_HLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USR_NAME,
	TVINPUT.RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT,
	TVINPUT.RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DTM,
	TVINPUT.DV_SO_HOLD_DT,
	TVINPUT.ACTION_CODE,
	TVINPUT.SO_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT,
			TVINPUT.RU_SO_RELEASE_COMMENT ,
		TVINPUT.SO_HOLD_COMMENT ,  
	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY 
							TVINPUT.SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY,
							TVINPUT.BK_SO_HOLD_DTM,
							TVINPUT.SO_RELEASED_ROLE,
							TVINPUT.RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DTM,
							TVINPUT.RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD,
										TVINPUT.RU_SO_RELEASE_COMMENT ,
		TVINPUT.SO_HOLD_COMMENT 
			     ORDER BY TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM  
	FROM
		(
		SELECT 
		WISOH.SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY			AS SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY,
		WISOH.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME   	AS START_TV_DTM,
		WISOH.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME			AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
		WISOH.BK_SO_HOLD_DTM				AS BK_SO_HOLD_DTM,
		WISOH.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME			AS BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME,
		WISOH.BK_SALES_ORDER_KEY			AS BK_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
		WISOH.SO_RELEASED_ROLE				AS SO_RELEASED_ROLE,
		WISOH.SS_CD  					AS SS_CD,
		WISOH.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT			AS SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
		WISOH.RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DT			AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DT,
		WISOH.RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD		AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD,
		WISOH.SO_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME		AS SO_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
		WISOH.SO_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME     		AS SO_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME  ,
		WISOH.SO_HOLD_REASON_TXT			AS SO_HOLD_REASON_TXT,
		WISOH.RU_SO_HLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USR_NAME		AS RU_SO_HLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USR_NAME,
		WISOH.RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT			AS RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT,
		WISOH.RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DTM			AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DTM,
		WISOH.DV_SO_HOLD_DT				AS DV_SO_HOLD_DT,
		'I'						AS ACTION_CODE,
		WISOH.SO_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT as SO_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT,
		WISOH.RELEASE_COMMENT AS RU_SO_RELEASE_COMMENT,
		WISOH.HOLD_COMMENT AS SO_HOLD_COMMENT  
		FROM
        (SELECT * FROM $$NRTSTGDB.WI_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NRT  
		 UNION ALL
		 SELECT * FROM $$NRTSTGDB.WI_OPL_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NRT /*Added as part of PR22169 to load XAAS Holds Data - lnuka*/
		)WISOH
		UNION ALL
		SELECT
		NSOHT.SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY		AS SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY,
		NSOHT.START_TV_DTM			AS START_TV_DTM,
		NSOHT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM			AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
		NSOHT.BK_SO_HOLD_DTM			AS BK_SO_HOLD_DTM,
		NSOHT.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME		AS BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME,
		NSOHT.BK_SALES_ORDER_KEY		AS BK_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
		NSOHT.SO_RELEASED_ROLE			AS SO_RELEASED_ROLE,
		NSOHT.SS_CD				AS SS_CD,
		NSOHT.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT		AS SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
		NSOHT.RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DT		AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DT,
		NSOHT.RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD	AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD,
		NSOHT.SO_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME	AS SO_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
                NSOHT.SO_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME	AS SO_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
                NSOHT.SO_HOLD_REASON_TXT		AS SO_HOLD_REASON_TXT,
		NSOHT.RU_SO_HLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USR_NAME	AS RU_SO_HLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USR_NAME,
		NSOHT.RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT		AS RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT,
		NSOHT.RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DTM		AS RU_SO_HOLD_RELEASE_DTM,
		NSOHT.DV_SO_HOLD_DT			AS DV_SO_HOLD_DT,
		'X'					AS ACTION_CODE,
		NSOHT.SO_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT as SO_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT,
		NSOHT.RU_SO_RELEASE_COMMENT AS RU_SO_RELEASE_COMMENT,
		NSOHT.SO_HOLD_COMMENT AS SO_HOLD_COMMENT  
		FROM
		$$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NRT_TV NSOHT
		WHERE NSOHT.END_TV_DTM =  '3500-01-01 00:00:00'  
		AND EXISTS
		(
		SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT * FROM $$NRTSTGDB.WI_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NRT  
					   UNION ALL
		               SELECT * FROM $$NRTSTGDB.WI_OPL_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NRT /*Added as part of PR22169 to load XAAS Holds Data - lnuka*/
		              )WISOH
		WHERE NSOHT.SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY = WISOH.SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY
		)
		) TVINPUT
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY, TVINPUT.START_TV_DTM ORDER BY TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME DESC) =1
	) TVOUTPUT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NRT_TV NSOHT_OUT
ON (NSOHT_OUT.SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY = TVOUTPUT.SALES_ORDER_HOLD_KEY
	AND NSOHT_OUT.END_TV_DTM ='3500-01-01 00:00:00' )
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1
